__note.description: File lock template for parallel agent coordination.
__note.held_by: Agent that currently holds the lock. Format: <role>@<session>, e.g. coder-a@build
__note.since: ISO 8601 timestamp when the lock was acquired
__note.files: Array of file paths that are locked under this record. An agent may lock multiple files in one lock record if they are part of the same atomic change.
__note.status: in_progress — lock is active, agent is working. waiting — agent is waiting but has not released the lock. released — agent has finished and released the lock.
__note.heartbeat: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent heartbeat. Updated every heartbeat_interval_seconds to prove the agent is still alive.
__note.stale_timeout: If current_time - heartbeat > stale_timeout_minutes, the lock is considered stale and may be reclaimed by build.
